calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-15-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Pro Tem Susan Lew, Clerk: V. Mack, CSR: JoAnn Bryce
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff Neveo Mosser.
Defendant Michael Turner present in pro per.
Parties reached a settlement whereby it is agreed that Judgment pursuant to Stipulation in open court be filed.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 917 Folsom Street, Apt. 411, San Francisco. Writ of execution is stayed until MAY-04-2004. Defendant shall pay Plaintiff the sum of $2,060.00 for past due rent an perdiem damages, payable in monthly installments of $10.00 starting July 1, 2004, with no prepayment penalty. Defendant waives right to stay of eviction, to move for new trial or appeal of Judgment entered. Any personal property left remaining at the premises shall be deemed abandoned. Rental agreement is declared void and forfeited. Plaintiff shall retain security deposit. If Defendant complies with the terms and prepares all documents necessary to vacate the judgment, Plaintiff shall file a dismissal with prejudice. The parties agree to mutual release from all claims.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
